name: Bath Athletics Track (University)
metaTitle: University of Bath Athletics Track | Info & Wind Speed
metaDescription: Check live wind speed and facility information for the University of Bath Sports Training Village (STV).

trackInfo.heading: Opening Times
trackInfo.text: Mon–Fri 06:00–22:00, Sat–Sun 08:00–19:00. Public availability depends on peak training schedules; check live timetables.

trackInfo.heading: Entry Price
trackInfo.text: Pay-as-you-go sessions are available via the Team Bath Connect online booking system or at reception.

trackInfo.heading: Track Details
trackInfo.text: World-class facilities featuring an 8-lane 400m outdoor track and a 132m indoor sprint straight.

trackInfo.heading: Parking Details
trackInfo.text: Pay-and-display parking is available on the University of Bath campus near the Sports Training Village.

trackInfo.heading: Address
trackInfo.text: Sports Training Village, University of Bath, Claverton Down, Bath, BA2 7AY

trackInfo.heading: Website
trackInfo.text: Visit the official Team Bath website for memberships, facility bookings, and live schedules.
